svg.title: ALIUS all-leaf mold sprouting logo with per-letter clipped continuous maze liquid letter reveal v04 fast growth normal sway
svg.desc: Pure SVG ALIUS logo, fast-growth normal-sway edition: the three leaves sprout with equal-duration mold-constrained vector paths, sway for two seconds after the third leaf completes, then the wordmark reveals through continuous MP4-inspired organic liquid-maze vector masks with coordinated sidewall traces, rounded circular growth fronts, U and S split-growth from interior seeds, and per-letter clipped continuous maze-style letter fills: each liquid path is confined to its own measured, sub-pixel padded glyph mold so neighboring strokes cannot reveal adjacent letters; A and I are single-source paths, L flows from its top source, U branches from one bowl source, and S uses connected paths with no remote circular nodes, so the S completes through the same flowing channel and the tagline keeps the MP4-derived gradual fade/reveal timing shifted to the faster timeline.
